description:
With 54 Cubic Foot capacity, our Lawn Tractor Leaf Bag is larger than normal leaf-collection system for ride-on mowers. Drawstring design and 112in maximum opening makes it easy to collect and empty leaves. Made of wear-resistant Oxford fabric cloth, it is waterproof and not easy to tear.

 

Feature：

54 Cubic Foot Capacity: With 54 Cubic Foot capacity, our Lawn Tractor Leaf Bag is larger than normal leaf-collection system for ride-on mowers. (Note: mowers are not included in the pack)

 

Easy Operation: With this Lawn Tractor Leaf Bag, you will easily set the bag into the tractor collection system and tighten the drawstring. Drawstring design makes it easy to collect and empty leaves.

 

Sturdy Cloth: When the leaf bag is filled with leaves and is dragged by your lawnmower, our durable yard waste bag is not easy to tear.

 

Extend Lifespan: Made of Oxford fabric, the Lawn Mower Leaf Bag can last a long time use. Please keep the bag in cool place when not in use to prolong its lifespan.

 

Easy To Carry & Store: Our Lawn Leaf Bag is presented with a carry bag, so that you can carry it to anywhere with it. When you are not using it, it can be folded and stored in this small bag to save space.

Specification：

 

Product Type: Tractor Leaf Bag

Color: Black

Material: 210D Oxford Cloth

Capacity: 54 Cubic

Folded Size: 26 x 18 x 10cm/ 10.24 x 7.09 x 3.94in

Item Size: 235x139 x 0.5cm/92.52x54.72x0.2in

Item Weight: 531g/1.17lbs

Package Size: 26*18*6cm/10.24*7.09*2.36in

Package Weight: 531g/1.17lbs

PackageContents：

 

2 x Tractor Leaf Bag
